text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text:
Wow, I can use magic? I never knew. That's an
amazing fact.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Don't play dumb! I saw you talking to that cat! Is
that kitty your familiar?!

text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text:
Cat? You must mean Hattori Shinobimaru. I had
no idea someone saw our secret meeting. He's just
my friend, though.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You can talk to him even though he's not a
familiar... So you can use magic to talk with
animals?

text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text:
I've been expanding my circle of friends recently.
I'm even friends with Yutaro Akabashira—you
know, that one old-school mailbox. Heh.

text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text: I'll have to introduce you sometime.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Inanimate objects too? So you talk to spirits?!
And you don't even need spells or wands... Hey,
you really have the makings of a witch!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I, extraordinary Magical Girl Sweepy, will make
an exception this once and take you on as my
apprentice!

text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text:
A magical girl apprentice... Magical Mascot Machan... Or
Ma-Ma-Machan for short. That could work.

text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text:
I have a whole lot to learn, but I'll try hard,
Master.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ah, and you know how to show proper respect! ♪
First things first, show me where that mailbox
spirit is!
